title: PipelineAnalysis
description: Append-only running diary of reasoning + decisions across phases. Mirrored server-side in workflows.iteration_state (TEXT). Worker reasoning propagates through this file between phases so each step can consult prior context. Parent design: §4.7, §9 invariant: 'Artifacts are context carriers'.

schema_version.description: Bumped only for non-backward-compatible shape changes. Forward-migration only.

phases.description: Append-only map of phase-name → PhaseAnalysis. Once a phase key exists, its value MUST NOT be overwritten — only augmented via additive fields.

reasoning.description: Free-form narrative the phase's workers emit — what they tried, what they observed, what they recommend for downstream phases.

decisions.description: Discrete decision records. Downstream phases consult these to avoid re-deciding or contradicting.

iterations.description: Per-iteration append-only log for phases that loop (eval, train). Indexed by position.

artifacts.description: Cross-references to persisted artifacts produced in this phase (filenames, DB IDs, URIs).

augmentations.description: Additive-only corrections or clarifications to this phase's reasoning. Written via augment_phase() — never overwrites prior content.
